name: OKR / Goals Tracker
description: Quarterly Objectives and Key Results modeled as an Epic per Objective with its Key Results as linked child issues, so progress rolls up automatically as work is completed.

teams.name: Leadership
teams.description: Company and team OKRs for the quarter.

workflowStates.name: On Track
workflowStates.description: Tracking to hit the target this quarter.

workflowStates.name: Missed
workflowStates.description: Quarter closed without hitting the target.

issueTemplates.title: Objective: Increase new-user activation
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
## Objective
New signups reach their "aha moment" faster and stick around.

Owner: Head of Product · Quarter: Q3

issueTemplates.title: Key Result: Increase Day-7 activation from 22% to 35%
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Measured via the `activation_completed` analytics event. Weekly check-in owner: Growth PM.

issueTemplates.title: Key Result: Reduce time-to-first-value from 12 min to 4 min
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Time from signup to first completed core action, p50.

issueTemplates.title: Objective: Raise platform reliability
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
## Objective
Customers stop noticing us as "the flaky one."

Owner: Head of Engineering · Quarter: Q3

issueTemplates.title: Key Result: 99.95% uptime, measured monthly
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Tracked via the status-page incident log. Any SEV-1 counts against the target.

issueTemplates.title: Key Result: Reduce P95 API latency from 800ms to 300ms
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Measured across the top 20 endpoints by traffic.

issueTemplates.title: Objective: Grow expansion revenue from existing accounts
issueTemplates.descriptionMd:
## Objective
Existing customers grow with us instead of churning to a competitor.

Owner: Head of Sales · Quarter: Q3

issueTemplates.title: Key Result: Net revenue retention from 98% to 110%
issueTemplates.descriptionMd: Tracked monthly in the finance dashboard.

views.name: OKR Board
views.description: All objectives grouped by check-in status.

views.name: Company Objectives
views.description: Top-level objectives only (filter to Epics), for the exec review.

views.name: Progress Table
views.description: Objectives and key results with owner, status, and quarter columns for the weekly check-in doc.
